2606.09613.title: AGENTSERVESIM: A Hardware-aware Simulator for Multi-Turn LLM Agent Serving
2606.09613.paper_summary: Multi-turn LLM agents interleave model calls with external tool invocations, shifting serving from stateless request processing to stateful program execution. Serving these workloads requires scheduling, KV-cache management, and routing policies that use program-level context, including turn dependencies, tool-induced gaps, and reusable KV state. Evaluating such policies directly on real systems is costly, since each design point may require dedicated accelerator time across arrival rates, model scales, serving-instance counts, and memory hierarchies. Simulation offers a scalable alternative, but existing LLM serving simulators target stateless request-level workloads and therefore omit the core dynamics of agent serving: multi-turn program execution, cross-turn cache locality, and KV-cache residency during tool gaps. We present AGENTSERVESIM, a hardware-aware simulator for multi-turn LLM agent serving. AGENTSERVESIM evaluates serving policies at program granularity through composable modules: a Program Orchestrator preserves program identity and turn order, a Tool Simulator materializes tool-induced gaps, a Session-Aware Router maintains program-to-instance affinity for cache-aware dispatch, and a KV Residency Model tracks policy-defined KV placement across HBM, host DRAM/CXL, and eviction. Across real serving deployments and hardware configurations, AGENTSERVESIM reproduces real-system behavior within 6% error across key performance metrics while running entirely on commodity CPUs. These results show that AGENTSERVESIM enables controlled, repeatable exploration of agent-serving policies without requiring exhaustive deployment on costly accelerators.
2606.09613.paper_summary_zh: 多輪 LLM 代理交錯模型調用與外部工具調用，將服務從無狀態請求處理轉變為有狀態程序執行。服務這些工作負載需要調度、KV 緩存管理和使用程序級上下文的路由策略，包括回合依賴、工具引起的間隙和可重用的 KV 狀態。在真實系統上直接評估這些策略是昂貴的，因為每個設計點可能需要在到達率、模型規模、服務實例數量和內存層級之間獲得專用加速器時間。模擬提供了一種可擴展的替代方案，但現有的 LLM 服務模擬器針對無狀態請求級工作負載，因此省略了代理服務的核心動態：多輪程序執行、跨輪緩存局部性和工具間隙期間的 KV 緩存常駐。我們提出了 AGENTSERVESIM，一個硬件感知的多輪 LLM 代理服務模擬器。AGENTSERVESIM 通過可組合模塊在程序粒度上評估服務策略：程序協調器保持程序身份和回合順序，工具模擬器具現工具引起的間隙，會話感知路由器維持程序到實例的親和力以進行緩存感知的調度，而 KV 常駐模型跟蹤政策定義的 KV 放置在 HBM、主機 DRAM/CXL 和驅逐之間。在真實的服務部署和硬件配置中，AGENTSERVESIM 在關鍵性能指標上以 6% 的誤差重現了真實系統行為，同時完全在商品 CPU 上運行。這些結果表明，AGENTSERVESIM 使得對代理服務策略的受控、可重複的探索成為可能，而無需在昂貴的加速器上進行全面部署。
2606.09613.author: Rakibul Hasan Rajib et.al.
2606.09613.authors: Rakibul Hasan Rajib, Mengxin Zheng, Qian Lou
